### Multi-rate Tg analysis

| Rate | Tg_MD |
|------|-------|
| 25 K/ns | 180.8 K |
| 40 K/ns | 191.6 K |
| 50 K/ns | 175.2 K |
| 100 K/ns | 184.2 K |
| 160 K/ns | 194.7 K |

**Log-linear**: Tg = 163.0 + 5.43·ln(Γ)  R²=0.2568
→ Tg at 1.67e-10 K/ns (DSC-equivalent, 10 K/min) = **185.3 K**  (theoretical DSC-equivalent experimental Tg)

**VF extrapolation** (Tg0 at Γ→0): quality=FAILED
